ddt:Target.Name: EDC17C84_170B_200_V03
ddt:Target.Description:
Applications: Espace concept Moteurs: R9M 409 Gen 1 ECU: EDC17C84 Logiciels: 170B_200 ------------------------------------------------------------- Auteur: Adrian IOSOB ------------------------------------------------------------- Documents de référence:
DID (RENAULT) : MCD_Config_170B_200_DG_DGT_DAT_0_15 1 0_RI_8 1.xls DID (FOURNISSEUR) : a_dg_dgt_das_msgdiag_rbx_xx_d_a(7.0).pdf Base de depart :EDC17C84_170B_100_V01.xml Base transverse utilssé : LIV 26
----------------------------------- Historique:
Version 03: Màj Ecran Routines: Start/Stop RoutineByLocalIdentifier ($31)
Version 02:
Correction des DIDs pour AutoIdent ($F194,$F195,$F1A0) Supprimé AutoIdent pour le soft 170B_100 Correction DID $240D - Intake air temperature
Verison 01: - Ajout les dids founisseur en conformité avec la fiche :a_dg_dgt_das_msgdiag_rbx_xx_d_a(7.0).pdf - Ajout les dids Renault en conformité avec le MCD_Config_170B_200_DG_DGT_DAT_0_15 1 0_RI_8 1.xls - Maj les routines après la LIV 26 - Maj les DTCs en conformité avec la LIV 26

RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Label.Text: Si Etat protégé = 1 alors démarrage impossible
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Danc ce cas le calculateur est déprotégé et n'interdit pas le démarrage moteur
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car il ne reçoit pas les trames de la BCM: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car la BCM ne répond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifié la clé ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monté sur le véhicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protégé car la BCM n'envoie pas la clé secrète: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisée à envoyer la clé secrète
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotégé" et n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a détécté une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)

Screen.Name: !!!! A lire avant d'utiliser les écrans !!!!

Label.Text: Ces valeurs doivent être saisies manuellement avant d'être réécrites.
- Le bouton "REINITIALISATION" permet d'écrire les valeurs d'initialisation d'un composant suite au changement de celui-ci.
Les valeurs seront automatiquement initialisées lors de l'appui du bouton, aucune saisie n'est nécessaire.
Dans les écrans suivants vous trouverez deux boutons: Ecriture et Réinitialisation.
- Après une reprogrammation ou changement d'un calculateur le bouton "ECRITURE" permet de réécrire les valeurs précédemment sauvegardées.

Label.Text: Readiness code completion PID 1 octet A + B
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet C + D
DATA BYTE B: On-board diagnostic evaluation and Continuous monitoring tests
DATA BYTE D: Status of tests run at least once per trip
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet B BIT B5/B6 - octet D BIT B7
DATABYTE B, BIT 6: CC monitoring readiness
DATABYTE D, BIT 7: EGR system monitoring
BIT 3: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
BIT 7: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
Test complete or not applicable = 0 soit diag joué
Test not complete = 1 soit diag non joué
DATA BYTE A: Number of DTC and MIL lamp status
Number of memorized emission-related powertrain failures
DATABYTE B, BIT 5: Fuel system monitoring readiness
DATA BYTE C: Supported tests run at least once per trip
Supported tests run at least once per trip

Label.Text: Le readiness de la classe EGR (via le service $22)
Les readiness de tous les diags qui participent au readiness de la classe EGR (via le service $19) et les variables qui montres l'état d'achèvement du diagnostic stockées
0 = Test complete or not applicable 1 = Test not complete
Les informations lues en utilisant le service de $23 ne sont valables que pour cette version du logiciel, car l'adresse mémoire se change avec la version du logiciel.
Les valeur des numerateur et denominateur ne sont pas affichées car ce ne sont pas encore calibrées

Label.Text: Number of times the system enters in each diagnosis' conditions (DID_$340B)
[0] Number of DC the offset learning condition was set true at least once
[1] Number of DC the diagnosis condition was set true at least once
[2] Number of DC the test condition was set true at least once
[3] Number of DC the temperature condition was set true at least once
[4] Number of DC the engine setpoint enables the test at least once
[5] Number of DC the error condition was set true at least once
[6] Number of DC the error stability condition was set true at least once
[7] Number of DC the engine setpoint enables offset learning at least once
[8] Number of DC the temperature enables calculation at least once
[9] Number of DC the exhaust mass flow enables calculation at least once
Number of criteria calculated by resolution (DID_$340D)
[0] Temperature is not within boudaries to perform test
[1] Engine Setpoint is not Ok to perform test
[2] Error is not within boundaries to perform test
[3] Error is not stable enough to learn offset
[4] Engine Setpoint is not Ok to perform Offset Learning
[5] DOC Upstream temperature exceeds limits so calculation is canceled
[6] Exhaust mass airflow exceeds limits so calculation is canceled
Number of times the system quits each diagnosis' conditions (DID_$3412)
Average of the highest durations in diagnosis conditions without diagnosis done (DID_$3436)

Label.Text: Number of times the system enters in each diagnosis' conditions (DID_$340C) IN
[0] Number of DC the Combustion Mode condition was set true at least once
[1] Number of DC the Quantity of fuel injected condition for zone 1 was set true at least once
[2] Number of DC the Engine Speed condition for zone 1 was set true at least once
[3] Number of DC the EGR Valve condition for zone 1 was set true at least once
[4] Number of DC the Exhaust Gaz Flow condition for zone 1 was set true at least once
[5] Number of DC the Quantity of fuel injected condition for zone 2 was set true at least once

[7] Number of DC the Exhaust Gaz Flow condition for zone 2 was set true at least once
[8] Number of DC the Quantity of fuel injected condition for zone 3 was set true at least once
[9] Number of DC the Engine Speed condition for zone 3 was set true at least once
[10] Number of DC the Exhaust Gaz Flow condition for zone 3 was set true at least once
[11] Number of DC the Quantity of fuel injected condition for zone 4 was set true at least once
[12] Number of DC the Engine Speed condition for zone 4 was set true at least once
[13] Number of DC the Exhaust Gaz Flow condition for zone 4 was set true at least once
